text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, my trainee and I will be taking on
the Twinkle Series. The Umamusume joining me
for this journey is none other than...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I'm Silence Suzuka. I look forward to working with
you.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Although I don't have any specific dreams to
speak of... I, um... I do like the beautiful view
from first place.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
...The weather is lovely today. Would you mind if
I went for a short jog?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, <chrname> and I take our
first steps towards competing in the Twinkle
Series!
